# NIP-75 Reference Card

kind:9041 event for fundraising goals. Required tags: amount (target in milisats), relays (list of relays for zaps). Optional tags: closed_at (timestamp), image (URL), summary (brief description). JSON example: {"kind": 9041, "tags": [["relays", "wss://relay1", "wss://relay2"], ["amount", "210000"]], "content": "Goal description"}. Filter pattern: kind:9041 AND (tags CONTAIN "relays" AND tags CONTAIN "amount").
